Tier List Stands Styles Subs Skins Codes Guides
← All Sub-Abilities
Part 7

Spin

Master the art of the Steel Ball. Ranged pressure with block bypass makes Spin the highest-skill-cap sub-ability. Devastating in skilled hands.

Passive: Fully charged attacks bypass blocking.
9/10PvP Value
5/10PvE Value
3/10Survival

Moves

T

Steel Ball

Throw a spinning steel ball that bypasses block on full charge.

Y

Golden Rotation

Enter a rotation state, boosting all projectile damage.

U

Multi Ball

Throw multiple steel balls in a spread pattern.

✅ Pros

  • Block bypass on charged attacks — extremely strong in PvP
  • Ranged pressure without needing to close distance
  • Highest PvP value of all sub-abilities
  • Golden Rotation state boosts all ranged output

❌ Cons

  • Requires precise aim — high skill floor
  • Low survival value — no defensive tools
  • Weak in PvE due to single-target focus

Best Stands to Pair With

S Made in Heaven A C-Moon A Stone Free B Anubis

How to Unlock

Find Gyro Zeppeli near Bus Stop 6 (requires Prestige 1). Costs $15,000.
